title: The Great Sinner
writer: Ladislas Fodor, Christopher Isherwood, René Fülöp-Miller
actors: Gregory Peck, Ava Gardner, Melvyn Douglas
plot: In the 1860s, in the casino resort town of Wiesbaden, Germany, a reformed gambling addict, Pauline Ostrovsky, tenderly nurses the talented Russian writer Fedja, who is a physical wreck.
